resources.string: Vill du verkligen dï¿½lja denna lï¿½t? Dess uppspelningstid och cache kommer att raderas. Denna ï¿½tgï¿½rd ï¿½r oï¿½terkallelig.

Ange fï¿½r nï¿½rvarande lï¿½tomslag som lï¿½sskï¿½rmsbakgrund
Nï¿½r cachen tar slut pï¿½ utrymme rensas de resurser som ï¿½r ï¿½ldst
Personliga instï¿½llningar (dvs. Temat) och cachen sï¿½kerhetskopieras inte.
Kom ihï¿½g att aktivera \"Okï¿½nda kï¿½llor\" i utvecklarinstï¿½llningarna fï¿½r Android Auto.
Spara varken nya sï¿½kningar eller visa historik
Om batterioptimering ï¿½r aktiverad kan uppspelningsaviseringen fï¿½rsvinna nï¿½r musiken pausas.
Eftersom Android 12, inaktivera batterioptimeringar krï¿½vs fï¿½r att \"Osynlig tjï¿½nst\" alternativ fï¿½r att trï¿½da i kraft.
Nï¿½r det inte rï¿½cker att stï¿½nga av batterioptimering
Spara och ï¿½terstï¿½ll senast spelade kï¿½n
Nï¿½r en trï¿½dbunden eller bluetooth-enhet ï¿½r ansluten
Hoppa ï¿½ver tysta delar under uppspelning

Befintliga data kommer att skrivas ï¿½ver. %1$s kommer automatiskt att stï¿½nga sig sjï¿½lv efter att ha ï¿½terstï¿½llt databasen.
Obs genom att klicka pï¿½ knappen nedan sï¿½ kommer platsen fï¿½r cache-mappen att ï¿½terstï¿½llas till standard
Eftersom Android 10, denna funktion kanske inte ï¿½r tillgï¿½nglig
Nï¿½r appen sveps bort frï¿½n aktivitetshanteraren
Ett fel intrï¿½ffade nï¿½r lï¿½ttexten hï¿½mtades
ï¿½r inte tillgï¿½nglig fï¿½r den hï¿½r lï¿½ten

Den ursprungliga videokï¿½llan fï¿½r den hï¿½r lï¿½ten har tagits bort
Den hï¿½r lï¿½ten kan inte spelas pï¿½ grund av serverbegrï¿½nsningar
Det returnerade video-id:t matchar inte det begï¿½rda
Minsta uppspelningstid fï¿½r att en lï¿½t ska fï¿½reslï¿½s i Snabbval
Det gick inte att hitta batterioptimeringsinstï¿½llningar, vï¿½nligen vitlista manuellt
Visualizer effekt krï¿½ver ï¿½tkomst till mikrofonen, vï¿½nligen bevilja.
Disable song switching via Vertical swipe
It affects only when the Expanded Player is off

Klistra in eller skriv in en giltig URL
Du kan lï¿½gga till en komplett lï¿½nk till en spellista, ett album, en kanal eller en lï¿½t frï¿½n YouTube eller YouTube Musik

Detta gï¿½r det mï¿½jligt att fï¿½ Discovery-innehï¿½ll pï¿½ ditt eget sprï¿½k.

ï¿½ppna webbsidan Github releases och ladda ned den senaste versionen
Ladda ned den senaste versionen frï¿½n Github, du hittar filen i meddelandefï¿½ltet och kan installera genom att klicka pï¿½ den
F-Droid anvï¿½ndare kan vï¿½nta pï¿½ uppdateringen frï¿½n F-Droid, som vanligtvis anlï¿½nder inom nï¿½gra timmar med IzzyOnDroid repo, och nï¿½gra dagar med F-Droid.org\'s repo.
Visa avisering fï¿½r att uppdatera appen nï¿½r ny version ï¿½r tillgï¿½nglig.
Nï¿½r en uppdatering finns tillgï¿½nglig sï¿½ fï¿½r du en frï¿½ga om du vill installera den. Inga uppdateringar installeras utan ditt medgivande.
Du kan fortfarande slï¿½ pï¿½/av den frï¿½n instï¿½llningarna.
Men dessa uppdateringar gï¿½r inte igenom den ytterligare screening som utfï¿½rs pï¿½ t.ex. IzzyOnDroid eller F-Droid.
Nï¿½r du klickar pï¿½ en lï¿½t, bï¿½rjar spelaren minimeras
Redigera svartlista fï¿½r pï¿½ enhetens lï¿½tar
ï¿½r du sï¿½ker pï¿½ att du vill ta bort den hï¿½r mappen frï¿½n svartlistan?
Utfï¿½r ï¿½tgï¿½rder genom att dra ï¿½t vï¿½nster eller hï¿½ger pï¿½ en lï¿½t i en vertikal lista ï¿½ver lï¿½tar
Undvik att stï¿½nga spelaren och rensa kï¿½n genom att dra nedï¿½t medan den ï¿½r minimerad
Vill du verkligen ta bort cache?
Tillstï¿½nd till media krï¿½vs, vï¿½nligen bevilja.
Hoppa till lï¿½ttexter genom att trycka pï¿½ linjen
Mapp som visas fï¿½r pï¿½ enhetens lï¿½tar
Klicka hï¿½r fï¿½r att vï¿½xla till
Det gï¿½r inte att ladda sidan, svep ner fï¿½r att uppdatera.
Tyvï¿½rr, tips ï¿½r inte tillgï¿½ngliga just nu.
Visa just nu uppspelning av lï¿½t
Det gick inte att hitta ljudequalizer-programmet

Kunde inte hitta en app fï¿½r att skapa dokument
Kunde inte hitta en app fï¿½r att surfa pï¿½ Internet
Vï¿½nligen vï¿½nta, detta kan ta nï¿½gra minuter...

Kan inte byta namn pï¿½ en mï¿½natlig spellista

Cannot rename a monthly or online or piped playlist
If enabled, create a log file to highlight errors
Tillgï¿½nglig nï¿½r miniatyrbild fï¿½r lï¿½ttexter ï¿½r inaktiverad
Anslut ditt piped-konto fï¿½rst eller inaktivera piped synkronisering
Privat cache-plats, kan inte rensas av systemet

Sov timer instï¿½lld till slutet av den hï¿½r lï¿½ten
Layout 2 rekommenderas endast fï¿½r stora skï¿½rmar
Felsï¿½kningslï¿½get ï¿½r aktiverat, kom ihï¿½g att inaktivera det i instï¿½llningarna
Markera lï¿½tar som har lagts till i din spellista
Song is Present in one of the Playlists
Ta bort lï¿½tar frï¿½n kï¿½n om de ingï¿½r i favoriter eller spellistor
Volume UP next and volume DOWN previous song
Ta bort bakgrundsoskï¿½rpa nï¿½r lï¿½ttexter ï¿½r inaktiverade
Pausad pï¿½ grund av noll volym
Fade audio when song is paused or played
Tar bort gillade lï¿½tar och spellista frï¿½n radio

Vill du verkligen ta bort denna lï¿½t? Den kommer att raderas frï¿½n databasen.\\nDenna ï¿½tgï¿½rd ï¿½r oï¿½terkallelig.
Vill du verkligen uppdatera den hï¿½r lï¿½ten? Uppspelningstid och cachade data kommer att raderas.\\nDen hï¿½r ï¿½tgï¿½rden ï¿½r oï¿½terkallelig.
Does not save playback events used for statistics, history and suggestions in Cubic Pics
Target gain for the loudness normalization
Om ett fel uppstï¿½r, hoppa till nï¿½sta lï¿½t
Ett fel intrï¿½ffade nï¿½r lï¿½ten %1$s spelades
Inloggning krï¿½vs fï¿½r att spela den hï¿½r lï¿½ten
Fï¿½regï¿½ende lï¿½t ï¿½r inte tillgï¿½nglig, hoppar ï¿½ver till nï¿½sta lï¿½t
Adds songs when the queue is about to end
From Android 12 pip can be automatically enabled
Lï¿½mna tomt eller med 0 fï¿½r att alltid hoppa till fï¿½regï¿½ende lï¿½t i kï¿½
Do you really want to delete all hidden songs from database? This action is irreversible.
The way the player is handled in the notification area and lockscreen.

Queue and Local Playlists Right Swipe
Long Press to change the size
Previews will be in low quality
Use metered connection to save data
Data saving decreases quality, use only if you have a connection with limited data
Use YTM login only for browse
To be used if the songs are not played when logged in
Cannot Perform this Action with the Disliked Songs
Kan inte utfï¿½ra denna ï¿½tgï¿½rd nï¿½r alla lï¿½tar ï¿½r ogillade

Deleting the Songs which are not in your Library. The App will Close After the Process is Over

Matching Songs. Please Wait. Do not Minimize or Exit the App
Do you really want to replace all the videos/unmatched songs with the matched songs? This action is irreversible
Updating the Playlist. Please Wait. Do not Minimize or Exit the App
Update the Songs with the Missing Album ID
Cannot Rename Albums saved in the Youtube Music Library
Cannot Delete Songs from an Online Playlist
Youtube Playlists are Limited to 5000 songs
songs are added in the YouTube Playlist. Repeat the process if there are any Missing Songs
songs will be added in the YTM playlist
Apply a depth effect to the audio
Allows automatic pause and resume playback after a call for example
Like CubicMusic Liked songs in Youtube
(estimated time) is required to like all the songs. This action cannot be resumed if cancelled in between. You need to close the app to cancel this process. Do you want to continue?
(estimated time) is required to like all the songs. You need to close the app to cancel this process. Do you want to continue?
Failed to like the song in YouTube
Failed to unlike the song in YouTube
Error occurred for the next 50 songs. Adding songs to the playlist one by one
Added the song in the YouTube Playlist
Failed to add the song in the YouTube Playlist
Could not find playing song on current list
No song is playing at the moment
Looking up album from the internet
Song must be cached or downloaded to export
Store your settings in a single file
Credentials such as YouTube login are excluded for security reasons
Restore your settings from file created by \"%s\"
For old users before conversion. \nUse old app to make a backup for migration
Om du ser detta meddelande betyder det att din kompilering inte har automatisk uppdatering aktiverad, pls uppdatera appen manuellt frï¿½n github
Adjust how slow/fast the song goes
Om du ï¿½ndrar instï¿½llningar fï¿½r spelare eller UI rekommenderas\natt starta om programmet.
Fï¿½r gamla anvï¿½ndare fï¿½re konvertering.\nAnvï¿½nd gamla appar fï¿½r att gï¿½ra en sï¿½kerhetskopia fï¿½r migrering.
Logga in pï¿½ ditt YTM-konto fï¿½r mer innehï¿½ll
Den nya versionen %s kan laddas ner!
Den nya versionen %s kan laddas ner!
Visa ï¿½ndringsloggar fï¿½r den version som fï¿½r nï¿½rvarande ï¿½r installerad
Detta ï¿½r fortfarande i Beta och kan innehï¿½lla buggar och krasch
Vï¿½lj hur mï¿½nga rekommenderade lï¿½tar som ska visas i Snabbval
Din Discord-token ï¿½r ogiltig, vï¿½nligen logga in igen
Om du mï¿½rker att RPC inte fungerar, fï¿½rsï¿½k logga ut och logga tillbaka, se ocksï¿½ till att starta om tjï¿½nsten och appen
Fel uppstod vid import av lokal spellista
Vï¿½lj vilka som visas fï¿½rst i sï¿½kresultaten
Den om avsnittet visar information om appen, utvecklare, felsï¿½kning och uppdatera alternativ
Diverse avsnitt innehï¿½ller olika valfria instï¿½llningar och verktyg
Datasektionen innehï¿½ller instï¿½llningar som ï¿½ndrar hur appen hanterar data lokalt och pï¿½ distans
Sektionen fï¿½r konton innehï¿½ller Youtube-synkroniseringsinstï¿½llningar, Piped streaming-instï¿½llningar och Discord RPC-instï¿½llningar
Sektionen Cubic Picks innehï¿½ller instï¿½llningar fï¿½r Cubic Picks sida och AI drivna rekommendationer
Den smarta rekommendationer avsnitt innehï¿½ller instï¿½llningar fï¿½r AI drivna rekommendationer
Konfigurera instï¿½llningar fï¿½r automatisk nedladdning fï¿½r lï¿½tar och album
Ladda ner lï¿½tar automatiskt baserat pï¿½ dina preferenser
Ladda ner lï¿½tar automatiskt nï¿½r du gillar dem
Ladda automatiskt ner lï¿½tar nï¿½r du bokmï¿½rke ett album
Nï¿½tverkssektionen innehï¿½ller instï¿½llningar fï¿½r att optimera appens prestanda och dataanvï¿½ndning
Tycker du om att klicka? Fortsï¿½tt dï¿½...
Okej, du letar efter nï¿½got, hï¿½lla...
Du ï¿½r nummer ett, klicka och njut av ï¿½verraskningen
Du ï¿½r nummer ett, lï¿½ngklicka och njut av ï¿½verraskningen
Den allmï¿½nna delen innehï¿½ller instï¿½llningar fï¿½r den allmï¿½nna funktionaliteten i appen
Lï¿½gg till en paus mellan lï¿½tarna
